reviews.review_description: Cartoons Grafik is good way for Quest Games

developer_response.body: Thank you! We think so too!

reviews.review_description:
Thank you for checking out AirRacer!
AirRacer is a game that is undergoing quite big changes, and is under constant development. More content will be added in the coming months. If you have feedback or want to chat with us devs, don’t hesitate to get in contact! 

We are also planning on hosting official competitions in the near future! So if you want to compete with fellow players, make sure to join our discord! 

https://discord.gg/6PMn27pZ4G

Thank you for playing and hope you have a fantastic racing career! :)

Actually, I really like it. There are two modes to choose from and a nice tutorial to start with as well as a collection of ships to be steered with the head moving through the different courses. There are obstacles to avoid or to shoot away with the trigger of the right controller and cubes to collect on the way.

However, in the menu you can select with the head but you need to use the trigger of the left controller to confirm any action. It took me a while to find out how to proceed.

I really hope the developers will continue to work on this racing game, since I see its high potential. Please include a ranking system for each course. I will be happy to give it more stars and to update my feedback.

developer_response.body:
Hello!

Thank you for a great review!
We are working hard on a new update and I can promise that it will be huge!
Completely reworked graphics, new maps with scoreboards and more! 
It will come in next month or so.

Fansi
